params.prompt: Create an ultra-clean premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC / social ad for Limitless Club. Course: HERMES AGENT. Subtitle: Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial, matte black, graphite, silver-white, tiny electric blue highlights, huge negative space. Use only refined type, one thin glowing frame, and three minimal agent cards. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. No robot face. No busy background. Make it feel like a luxury SaaS/founder masterclass ad. All text large, accurate, safe margins, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
